/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/what.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/what.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/what.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/what.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/what.dir/src/Enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/what.dir/src/Kunti.cpp.o CMakeFiles/what.dir/src/Barrel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/what.dir/src/Jumpscare.cpp.o CMakeFiles/what.dir/src/Labirin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/what.dir/src/utils.cpp.o -o what  -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image
